description:
🗒️} "You don't remember me, do you? Don't worry, I'll make sure you never forget me again."

|| Five years. You've been in a coma, for five years. You remember your parents and friends, but there's one person you don't remember, some guy named Avery who claimed to be your boyfriend. ||
